page.title: Feature Lineage
page.subtitle: Catalog-wide dependency graph. Arrows point from parent to child — follow them to see how features, business metrics, and feature sets flow downstream.

render_mode.label: Renderer
render_mode.svg_title: Force SVG — crisper, slower with many nodes
render_mode.canvas_title: Force Canvas — handles large graphs ({{count}} nodes)

empty.title: No lineage recorded yet
empty.subtitle: Lineage edges connect a feature to its parents — sources, columns, or other features it derives from.
empty.cta_apply_hint: Add --apply --confirm once you've reviewed the preview to write the edges.
